note: Repo-root catalog: add new tool keys and model ids here when vendors ship updates. FLOWAI_ALLOW_UNKNOWN_MODEL=1 skips strict checks in flowai config validate / flowai start and in phase runs for gemini/claude. FLOWAI_SKIP_CONFIG_VALIDATE=1 skips only the start/validate gate. FLOWAI_HOME must contain this file.

models.description: Opus for planning, Sonnet for execution

cursor.note: FlowAI tool=cursor only prints prompts for paste into Cursor; it does not pass model flags to a subprocess. Cursor itself routes chat/agent to many provider models (Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, xAI, etc.); names in the app change with your plan and Cursor version. Use Cursor Settings → Models (or https://cursor.com/docs/models) for the authoritative list. CLI: https://cursor.com/docs/cli/using · Composer 2: https://cursor.com/docs/models/cursor-composer-2

models.description: Follow whatever model is selected in Cursor Settings / Agent (recommended)
Composer 2 family — see Cursor models doc
Cursor fast/free-tier style model when offered
Anthropic Sonnet line in Cursor (exact label varies, e.g. Sonnet 4.x)
Anthropic Haiku / fast Claude in Cursor
OpenAI GPT-4o when enabled for your account
OpenAI GPT-4.1 family when shown in picker
OpenAI reasoning models (o3 / o3-mini, etc.) when available
Google Gemini Pro-class in Cursor when connected
Google Gemini Flash in Cursor when connected
xAI Grok when offered in Cursor
DeepSeek and other hosted models Cursor may expose (Fireworks, etc.)
